gitCommit.subject: Improve VDP Connect end-to-end test coverage
gitCommit.body:
Improve VDP Connect end-to-end test coverage

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

gitCommit.subject: Improve VDP Connect end-to-end test coverage
gitCommit.body:
Improve VDP Connect end-to-end test coverage

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

specs.title: User accesses account and privacy settings and logs out @high
Admin moderation is available to admins and denied to normal users @medium

annotations.description: Skipped: E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/E2E_ADMIN_PASSWORD not configured — admin moderation scenario requires admin credentials
Skipped: E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/E2E_ADMIN_PASSWORD not configured — admin moderation scenario requires admin credentials

specs.title: Registered user logs in and reaches the home feed @high
Login rejects empty fields and invalid credentials @high
User adds a comment, replies, and deletes their own comment @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable comment-id selectors required for scoped reply/delete assertions are not present in scoped sources
Missing selector in src/: stable comment-id selectors required for scoped reply/delete assertions are not present in scoped sources

specs.title: Comment form rejects empty and over-limit text @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: explicit comment-validation selectors for over-limit states are not included in scoped source files
Missing selector in src/: explicit comment-validation selectors for over-limit states are not included in scoped source files

specs.title: Non-admin user cannot delete another user's comment @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable other-user comment selectors for permission assertions are not available in scoped sources
Missing selector in src/: stable other-user comment selectors for permission assertions are not available in scoped sources

specs.title: User updates profile information and cancels an unsaved edit @medium
Edit Profile rejects invalid required, URL, length, and image values @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: explicit field-level validation selectors for invalid URL/length/image errors are not provided in scoped selector sources
Missing selector in src/: explicit field-level validation selectors for invalid URL/length/image errors are not provided in scoped selector sources

specs.title: User follows and unfollows another user @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable target-user fixture identifiers for follower-count/list assertions are not available in scoped selectors
Missing selector in src/: stable target-user fixture identifiers for follower-count/list assertions are not available in scoped selectors

specs.title: Guest is denied access to the home feed @high
Registered users exchange a private message @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: messaging selectors are outside E2E_SCOPE.md selector source list
Missing selector in src/: messaging selectors are outside E2E_SCOPE.md selector source list

specs.title: User views a notification produced by an in-scope social action @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: notification list selectors and notification-id attributes are outside scoped source files
Missing selector in src/: notification list selectors and notification-id attributes are outside scoped source files

specs.title: New user completes onboarding and reaches the feed @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: onboarding image-upload, interests, and suggested-user selectors are not present in scoped selector sources
Missing selector in src/: onboarding image-upload, interests, and suggested-user selectors are not present in scoped selector sources

specs.title: User skips optional onboarding steps @low

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: skip controls and optional onboarding-step selectors are not documented in scoped source files
Missing selector in src/: skip controls and optional onboarding-step selectors are not documented in scoped source files

specs.title: Onboarding rejects a non-image profile-picture upload @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: onboarding file-upload and upload-error selectors are not available in scoped selector sources
Missing selector in src/: onboarding file-upload and upload-error selectors are not available in scoped selector sources

specs.title: Password reset gives a security-safe response for existing and unknown email addresses @medium
User creates a valid text post with selected visibility @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: scenario requires stable composer data-testid selectors that are not present in scoped source files
Missing selector in src/: scenario requires stable composer data-testid selectors that are not present in scoped source files

specs.title: User creates supported image, video, and link posts @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable created-post verification selectors for media/link assertions are not documented in E2E scope
Missing selector in src/: stable created-post verification selectors for media/link assertions are not documented in E2E scope

specs.title: Post composer rejects empty, oversized, and unsupported submissions @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable validation selectors for over-limit and unsupported-media errors are not provided in scoped sources
Missing selector in src/: stable validation selectors for over-limit and unsupported-media errors are not provided in scoped sources

specs.title: User cancels post creation without publishing the draft @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: discard-confirmation selectors are not defined in scoped source files
Missing selector in src/: discard-confirmation selectors are not defined in scoped source files

specs.title: User likes, saves, opens comments, and opens an author profile from a feed post @high

Missing selector in src/: stable seeded-post identifiers required for safe post-level scoping are not available in scoped sources

specs.title: User shares and reports a feed post @medium

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: share/report dialog selectors for this scenario are outside E2E_SCOPE.md selector sources
Missing selector in src/: share/report dialog selectors for this scenario are outside E2E_SCOPE.md selector sources

specs.title: Post owner edits and then deletes a post with confirmation @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable owned-post identifiers needed to scope edit/delete actions are not in scoped selector sources
Missing selector in src/: stable owned-post identifiers needed to scope edit/delete actions are not in scoped selector sources

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: non-owner seeded-post selectors for permission assertions are not available in scoped source files
Missing selector in src/: non-owner seeded-post selectors for permission assertions are not available in scoped source files

specs.title: Post visibility restricts followers-only and private content @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: stable post-level visibility markers and deterministic multi-user fixtures are not present in scoped assets
Missing selector in src/: stable post-level visibility markers and deterministic multi-user fixtures are not present in scoped assets

specs.title: Private profile content is restricted from unauthorized viewers @high

annotations.description: Missing selector in src/: dedicated private-profile status selector and deterministic private-profile fixtures are not present in scoped sources
Missing selector in src/: dedicated private-profile status selector and deterministic private-profile fixtures are not present in scoped sources
